feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Integration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PI/PO To CPI Migration
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We are planning for PI/PO to CPI migration. We also have our S/4 Rise migration planned. So I would like to know if we should plan the PI/PO to CPI migration after the S/4 Rise migration or if we can start the PI/PO to CPI migration before that. What could be the pros and cons of doing the PI/PO to CPI migration before the S/4 Rise migration?

 

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP Process Integration SAP Process Orchestration RISE with SAP 


Thanks and Regards
Sachin Kumar Singh

entry.title: Errors in SAP Backend SXMB_MONI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have outbound interfaces from SAP ECC to partner systems via SAP PO and we are from SAP PO side.

Could you please help us to identify the root cause of the issue and to avoid this issue in future?

Please find below screenshot that shows the error in SXMB_MONI and is there something that can be done on SAP PO side. If not who can help us to resolve the issue and also ensure that these messages in SXMB_MONI wont occur again in future? Thank you!

Regards,

Ramu.

entry.title: Can we use SAP PI/PO system and SAP Solution Manager in SAP RISE
entry.content:
Background: Planning a migration to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (Rise) and concerned about the future of certain tools that we are currently using:

Questions 1) Currently have SAP Solution Manager 7.2 in SQL Server 2012 on premise and  would like to know if it is worth planning some type of SQL Server upgrade for this project or is there any other tool that will replace the functionality of the Solution Manager in SAP Rise ?

Question 2) Having 2 PI servers (Process Integrator 7.5) in SQL Server 2012 on premise that act as middleware between the ERP and (SAP SuccessFactors or SAP Concur), and want to know the same way in this conversion process / migration to SAP Rise, how would this component function in the new Rise architecture, will it be replaced by which tool?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integration of SAP PI-PP or SAP PI-PCS with Aveva MES
entry.content:
Hi Team,


I just have a quick question, is there any possibility to communicate SAP- PI-PCS with Aveva MES system for the process industry. I want to transfer the manufacturing process values and parameters in addition wants to transfer plant data, production process quality management, order tracking etc from SAP to MES.

I know there is SAP PP module and it has SAP PP-PCS interface to link with the external 3rd parties software. Can anyone help me to figure out the way how can I connect or integrate the SAP PP-PI with Aveva MES.

Any input would be appreciated.

Thanks & Best Regards

SSamber

entry.title: PI Polling Watchdog giving false Alerts
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a issue,  i set up the Polling Watchdog for alerts when a channel stops polling and it was working fine. 

All of sudden, it started sending false alerts for ALL channels,  my email inbox is swamped with emails.  The channels are polling fine. 

What can be causing this, and would a complete restart solve it?. 

thanks so much for any advise.

Javier.

entry.title: Issue while connecting single S4 SAP system with 2 different PI/PO systems
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to process BP master data (example :BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_Out) from S4 system to multiple PI/PO systems.

we have configured RFC destinations, sxmb_admin parameters as per first solution provided in blog  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/proxy-for-multiple-esrs/ba-p/13332250

IE Config: (Proxy settings at S4)

Category

parameters

subparameter

Current value

Default value

runtime

Is_url

 

dest://PI1_ADVANCE_ADAPTER_ENGINE

 

runtime

Is_url

PISYSTEM2

dest://PI2_ADVANCE_ADAPTER_ENGINE

 

The S4 system will trigger the standard service 'BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_Out'. and in both PI/PO systems, we are using standard XICONTENT and configured ICO as passthrough. (no mapping and no ESR). 

The issue we're facing is that when we trigger data from the ECC system, it always processes to PI system 1 only. i.e. default destination configured at sxmb_admin -->IE config. eventhough we configured runtime parameter IS_URL for second PI/PO system.

So the question is:  when S4 trigger BP data, given that the name space will be same, how does S4 differentiate to which PI system it should send data to?  the IS_URL configured for both PI /PO system 1 and 2 and for system2 the subparameter config done at sender/receiver id however it still shows same namespace.

is there anything we need to change at proxy code level? for the abap class 'CL_XMS_PLSRV_IE_ADAPTER-ENTER'? or any changes at PI/PO ICO side? please advise.

entry.title: JSON fromat Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Expected Json format is like Below ( this format is when i run in the postman showing successful) 

 
{
    "sequenceNumber": ,
    "uhlId": " ",
    "dataType": " ",
    "plantCodeLetter": " ",
    "plantIdentifier": " ",
    "fileCreationDate": " ",
    "fileCreationTime": " ",
    "sourceSystem": " ",
    "programVersionOne": " ",
    "programVersionTwo": "string",
    "programVersionThree": "string",
    "tt971Date": " ",
    "tt971Time": " ",
    "completeDataLoad": " ",
    "payload": [ " "
]
} 
As per the expectation i have Created structure Like below

After run the interface also  Json format convertion also coming in SAP PO  like below
{"sequenceNumber": X,"uhlId":"XXX,"dataType":"XXXX","plantCodeLetter":"string","plantIdentifier":"XXX","fileCreationDate":20230127,"fileCreationTime":20230127,"sourceSystem":"XXXX","programVersionOne":"YYYYY","programVersionTwo":"string","programVersionThree":"string","tt971Date":20230127,"tt971Time":"00000","completeDataLoad":"00000","payload":[ " " ]
}
 looks like both are same, But when I use this json format in the Postman tool it is showing as 400 BAD request

Could you please let me know , what changes i have to do,

entry.title: How to get the target fields has also same kind of Source field character lengths in sap PI
entry.content:
Dear Team,

we have a requirement ,  .CSV( fixed length file) file picking By SAP PI and converted xml using file adaptor FCC, 

Source field lengths : 
8,4,3,3,4,8,6,21,9,5,9,30,3,10,58,5,10,1,1,10,5,101,27,4,2,9,248,1
but target expecting JSON format file, JSON data expecting the same lengths,
Example : 
Source field length - 8 characters, here data is coming 3 characters, remaining spaces will come
Target also expecting same,
<field> PQ1----- </field>
Here " ----- " called spaces.

Input CSV file : JP1     LAB 003605025 20230127040755A9618204039          15463920 892  00000007502012023                      V11000000000000000000LU LEUCHTEINHEIT / RV LI / LED TFL FRA/G          
Output Json format : 

 "payload": [
        "JP1     LAB 003605025 20230127040755A9618204039          15463920 892  00000007502012023                      V11000000000000000000LU LEUCHTEINHEIT / RV LI / LED TFL FRA/G          


Kindly help me.

entry.title: Download large file using REST adapter in SAP PO 7.5
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have requirement to download a large file ( > 2GB) using REST URL.

The actual message flow is like we need to fetch the file having username/password from AL11 and call the REST URL to download the file(.tar file).

I have tried to use the async - sync config, fetching the file from AL11 and calling the Rest URL and trying to save the downloaded file using File receiver channel(used in File sender channel Module) but the message is getting failed due to large file size.

 

Is it possible to use chunk mode or using unix script?

Kindly suggest how to achieve this requirement using SAP PO. 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: Can we change the time range in message status overview - from 5:30 - 5:30 to 12:00 - 12:00
entry.content: The current filter criteria is restricted  to view accurate data for one whole  as it starts from 5:30. If we can get it displayed as 00:00 - 00:00 , it helps in retrieving data accurately per day. Kindly let me know if we can change it.

entry.title: SAP BTP Integration Suite trial account and interfaces developed vanish after 64 days
entry.content:
Has this happened to anyone else, i created the  Integration Suite trial on 30th May, have done a lot of interfaces, had close to 29 published interfaces with over a 250+ messages with API`s and all were working fine. Today morning i log in and i noticed the Integration suite service was not in my subscriptions and everything was nuked. I had to setup the trial again and this time it tells me i have 26 days left.

What happened to all my interfaces. I ran the booster again and now it says capabilities are not activated, ok so i ran the booster again, which completed successfully, i redid all the roles again- same result. 

This is what i find interesting, on the account i see a message that the current trial of 90 days expires in 26 days, indicating integration suite account was opened on 30th. However the paragraph also says your trial account will be deleted in 56 days from now, this is painful. I know in all likelihood, nothing will be done as its a trial account, just lost a lot of learning.

entry.title: iFlow issues with HTTP connections
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

                I have just started with CPI and trying to create a basic iFlow. In the below screen shot I have very simple iFlow using an HTTP adapter. I deployed the iFlow and pasted the URL in POSTMAN using Basic Authentication. For authentication I am using my SAP email and password which I use to login to my trial account.

 

I am very that my credentials are corrected, I have checked them multiple times.

What is that I am doing wrong? Is there a step that I am missing?

entry.title: NW 7.4 dual stack upgrade
entry.content:

We need to upgrade NW 7.4 Dual stack to NW 7.5
Please send us blog/steps involved in this activity

entry.title: SAP PI Java Migration to PO
entry.content:
Currently We have SAP PI Java Server we need to migrate to PO want to know just upgrading the server to latest SP level help or i have to build new Pralled landscape as their is no ABAP system for this 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to produce JSON with hyphenated field members in a Receiver with the REST Adapter
entry.content:
Hello my sweet people 🙂

I am trying to figure out how to communicate with an existing HTTP JSON API which expects incoming request bodies to have JSON with hyphenated field names.

Something like, say, this:

{
"first-name": "Dietmar",
"last-name": "Hoppe",
"friendly-greeting": "Thank you for the playgrounds they are so awesome!"
}

So I need to produce an HTTP POST request that has a request body like that.

To say that I'm experiencing difficulty would be putting it mildly. Imagine giving a two-year-old a pack of Crayolas and asking them to create the Mona Lisa. My odds of success feel about like that.

I have read the documentation about XML/JSON conversion. I have looked in vain across vast stretches of the internet using The Google. I have even broken down and asked the infernal Gippity - who claims this is only possible by drawing upon the dark powers of Java user-defined functions.

Nay, I dare not again venture into that world, and therefore beseech you to assist my feeble efforts on my journey towards Process Integration Enlightenment.

I beg of you, do not look askance as your fellow man lay bare his struggles, but replenish the world with your generosity of knowledge.

entry.title: Can we clean up objects SAP PI box in bulk.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have one new dev box created  as the copy of existing DEV box . Now we want to delete the not required integration from the new dev box. Do we have any job or any way that we can bulk delete the objects(iflows etc) rather than deleting one by one.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP PO : Multipart/form-data error when sending attachment through REST receiver adapter
entry.content:
I have a requirement to send a multipart/form-data body payload through REST receiver adapter. This is the POSTMAN HTTP source code that is successfully sent.

 

I have set my REST receiver CC as below.

and have successfully used java mapping to construct the payload in below format.

However, i receiver error in the REST receiver adapter.

Please help me what configuration am i still missing.

entry.title: How can we add the Private Key Alias in the channel configuration when using TPM?
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are facing the problem that we are not able to add the Private Key Alias in the TPM configuration for Trading Partner AS2 Sender channel. The filed remains grey with no option to add the Private Key Alias.

Can you advise what we are missing?

Regards
David

entry.title: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate with the Jira to create a ticket/issue via SAP CPI to reduce the usage of the third part tool which does the same thing. 

I have referred the below blogs and tried to create a sample IFlow in the sap cpi but unfortunately, I am unable to proceed further due to the error encountered which states as below. 

The Jira Cloud platform REST API (atlassian.com)

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://<hostname>/rest/api/2/issue/ with statusCode: 415

FYI, I am able to get the details of the existing ticket but unable to create the ticket via CPI. But managed to create the ticket via POSTMAN.

Sample IFLow.

 

Payload used:

{
"fields": {
"project": {
"key": "SDC"
},
"summary": "Demo ticket from the CPI via API",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"description": "PLEASE IGNORE THIS ISSUE TICKET",
"assignee": {
"name": "Imran"
},
"labels": [
"Demo"
]
}
}

Please advice on this. Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Can I use data from inbound PI proxy to execute ABAP query report?
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement wherein input data will be coming from ServiceNow and I would like to use those input data to execute an ABAP report that does query on different tables depending on one of the input data. Can this be done via inbound PI proxy? Thank you.

Regards
